tasks.subject: Task 1: Scheduler types, parsing, validation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Lay down the data types (`Scheduler`, `ScheduleEntry`, `ScheduleTime`, `LastApply`, `retryState`), the HH:MMâ†”minute-of-day parser, and the `validate()` function.

**Files:**
- Create: `cmd/breezyd/scheduler.go`
- Create: `cmd/breezyd/scheduler_test.go`

**Verify:** `go test ./cmd/breezyd/ -run 'TestSchedule' -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/breezyd/scheduler.go", "cmd/breezyd/scheduler_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./cmd/breezyd/ -run 'TestSchedule' -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ScheduleTime parse/format roundtrip", "ScheduleEntry JSON roundtrip uses HH:MM", "validate rejects bad action/pct/duplicate-at/>24-entries with ErrInvalidArg"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Scheduler persistence (Load/save)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Disk persistence for the schedule. Atomic temp+rename, malformed-file recovery, location at `<state_dir>/schedule_<device>.json`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `cmd/breezyd/scheduler.go`
- Modify: `cmd/breezyd/scheduler_test.go`

**Verify:** `go test ./cmd/breezyd/ -run 'TestScheduler_(Persist|Load|Save)' -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/breezyd/scheduler.go", "cmd/breezyd/scheduler_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./cmd/breezyd/ -run 'TestScheduler_(Persist|Load|Save)' -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Load missing file returns empty state", "Load malformed file returns empty + slog warn", "save+Load roundtrip preserves state", "save is atomic (no leftover .tmp)"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Scheduler tick + fire (no retry)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `tick(ctx, now)` and `fire(ctx, entry)` covering happy path + structural edges. No retry yet (Task 4).

**Files:**
- Modify: `cmd/breezyd/scheduler.go`
- Modify: `cmd/breezyd/scheduler_test.go`

**Verify:** `go test ./cmd/breezyd/ -run 'TestScheduler_(Tick|Fire)' -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/breezyd/scheduler.go", "cmd/breezyd/scheduler_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./cmd/breezyd/ -run 'TestScheduler_(Tick|Fire)' -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["No catchup on first tick", "Midnight wraparound fires once", "Multi-match window fires latest only", "off action only writes Power(false)", "regen/etc writes Power+Mode+SpeedManual in order", "lastApply records OK and failure cases"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Retry state machine
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Bounded retry: 30s cadence, 10m deadline, supersede on next entry, no retry for ErrAuth.

**Files:**
- Modify: `cmd/breezyd/scheduler.go`
- Modify: `cmd/breezyd/scheduler_test.go`

**Verify:** `go test ./cmd/breezyd/ -run TestRetry -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/breezyd/scheduler.go", "cmd/breezyd/scheduler_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./cmd/breezyd/ -run TestRetry -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Timeout installs retry", "Auth failure installs no retry", "Success clears retry", "Deadline abandons retry (lastApply.ok stays false)", "Newer entry supersedes retry", "Disable clears retry"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Run loop + wire into startPollers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `Run(ctx)` with minute-aligned ticker; `startPollers` builds Scheduler per device; `Handler.Schedulers` populated.

**Files:**
- Modify: `cmd/breezyd/scheduler.go`
- Modify: `cmd/breezyd/scheduler_test.go`
- Modify: `cmd/breezyd/main.go`
- Modify: `cmd/breezyd/server.go`

**Verify:** `go build ./... && just check`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/breezyd/scheduler.go", "cmd/breezyd/scheduler_test.go", "cmd/breezyd/main.go", "cmd/breezyd/server.go"], "verifyCommand": "go build ./... && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Run exits on ctx cancel", "startPollers wires Scheduler per device", "Handler.Schedulers populated", "scheduleDial returns recordingClient without locking UDP twice"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: HTTP GET/PUT /v1/devices/{name}/schedule
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Two routes for schedule read and wholesale replace. Validation echoes `Scheduler.validate`; PUT clears `lastApply` + retry and persists atomically.

**Files:**
- Create: `cmd/breezyd/handlers_schedule.go`
- Modify: `cmd/breezyd/server.go`
- Modify: `cmd/breezyd/server_test.go`
- Modify: `cmd/breezyd/scheduler.go` (add `Replace`)

**Verify:** `go test ./cmd/breezyd/ -run 'TestHandler_(Get|Put)Schedule' -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/breezyd/handlers_schedule.go", "cmd/breezyd/server.go", "cmd/breezyd/server_test.go", "cmd/breezyd/scheduler.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./cmd/breezyd/ -run 'TestHandler_(Get|Put)Schedule' -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GET empty schedule returns enabled=false, entries=[]", "PUT roundtrip echoes saved state", "Validation: bad action, low/high pct, bad At, duplicate At all return 400", "PUT persists to disk"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Status JSON service.schedule glue
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `getDevice` includes `service.schedule = {enabled, entries, alert, last_apply?}` so the dashboard can read schedule state from the same poll-cached endpoint.

**Files:**
- Modify: `cmd/breezyd/handlers_device.go`
- Modify: `cmd/breezyd/server_test.go`

**Verify:** `go test ./cmd/breezyd/ -run TestHandler_GetDevice_IncludesSchedule -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/breezyd/handlers_device.go", "cmd/breezyd/server_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./cmd/breezyd/ -run TestHandler_GetDevice_IncludesSchedule -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["service.schedule present when Scheduler wired", "alert bool reflects last_apply OK/fail", "service.schedule absent when no Scheduler"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: SCHEDULE UI block
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Collapsible SCHEDULE block above Controls with table editor, validation, save handler, alert force-expand.

**Files:**
- Modify: `cmd/breezyd/ui/index.html`

**Verify:** Manual smoke in browser; Playwright (Task 9) locks behaviour.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/breezyd/ui/index.html"], "verifyCommand": "just build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Collapsed by default, force-expand on alert", "Off greys pct", "+ add and Ă— delete work", "Save button disabled on validation errors", "Save PUTs schedule to backend", "Alert warn line shows At+err+retries"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Playwright tests for SCHEDULE block
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Lock the UI contract with six Playwright scenarios: empty, populated, off-greys-pct, duplicate-at-disables-save, alert force-expand, save round-trip.

**Files:**
- Modify: `tests/ui/dashboard.spec.ts`

**Verify:** `just test-ui`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/ui/dashboard.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "just test-ui", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Empty schedule renders collapsed", "Populated schedule renders all rows", "off action greys pct (readonly + class)", "Duplicate At disables save button", "Alert forces open + shows warn line", "Save click PUTs the edited table"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Docs + screenshots regeneration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** README, CHANGELOG, CLAUDE.md updates plus regenerated dashboard screenshots showing the SCHEDULE block populated and expanded.

**Files:**
- Modify: `tests/ui/screenshot.ts`
- Regenerate: `tests/ui/screenshots/dashboard-{3col,1col}.png`
- Modify: `README.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`, `CLAUDE.md`

**Verify:** `just check-all`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/ui/screenshot.ts", "tests/ui/screenshots/dashboard-3col.png", "tests/ui/screenshots/dashboard-1col.png", "README.md", "CHANGELOG.md", "CLAUDE.md"], "verifyCommand": "just check-all", "acceptanceCriteria": ["screenshots regenerated", "README mentions SCHEDULE", "CHANGELOG has new entry", "CLAUDE.md has Schedule system subsection", "check-all green"]}
```
